title: ENTERTAIN SET OF 2 42CL COCKTAIL GLASSES
features: Set of 2 42cl cocktail glasses from the Ravenhead Entertain collection - suitable for both special occasions and everyday usage
Boast an elegant shape with tall bowl that is perfect for an array of your favourite cocktails
Crafted from high-quality, strong, durable glass that is dishwasher safe
Packaged in a stylish gift box
description: The Entertain collection from Ravenhead includes an extensive range of specialist cocktail glasses in a variety of shapes and sizes. From contemporary, oversized gin balloon glasses to the traditional cocktail saucer. All are made from durable, quality glass that is ideal for presenting an array of cocktail creations.
